title: whoever/whatever/whichever + S + V

formulas.zh: 複合關係代名詞引導的名詞子句，含先行詞，whoever=任何...的人，whatever=任何...的事物，whichever=任何...哪一個
複合關係代名詞可置於主句後，作為條件或讓步子句

explanation: 複合關係代名詞(whoever/whatever/whichever)兼具關係代名詞與先行詞的雙重身份，不需額外先行詞。Whoever相當於anyone who，whatever相當於anything that，whichever相當於whichever one that。此類詞可在句中作主詞、受詞或介系詞受詞，引導名詞子句或讓步子句。區別於普通關係代名詞(who/what)必須有明確先行詞。學測常考作主詞或受詞的用法。

examples.eng: Whoever wins the competition will receive a scholarship from the university.
examples.chi: 誰贏得比賽，就能從大學獲得獎學金。

examples.eng: You can choose whatever book interests you most from the library collection.
examples.chi: 你可以從圖書館藏書中選擇任何你最感興趣的書籍。

examples.eng: Whichever option you prefer, the company will support your decision completely.
examples.chi: 無論你偏好哪個選項，公司都會完全支持你的決定。

examples.eng: Whatever mistakes we made in the past should not prevent us from moving forward.
examples.chi: 無論我們過去犯了什麼錯誤，都不應該阻止我們前進。

extension.tip: 複合關係代名詞與普通關係代名詞的區別在於：前者已包含先行詞，後者需要先行詞。若句子缺少先行詞但需要關係詞，必用複合關係代名詞。注意whoever/whatever/whichever通常位於子句首位，引導完整名詞子句或讓步子句。避免誤用who、what、which而遺漏先行詞。

examples.test: ✓ Whoever arrives first will get the best seat.
examples.result: → 正確。Whoever已包含先行詞與關係詞雙重身份，作主詞。

examples.test: ✗ The person who arrives first will get the best seat.
examples.result: → 正確但不同結構。此句使用普通關係代名詞who，需要先行詞person。

examples.test: ✓ Whatever you say will be recorded and used in the meeting.
examples.result: → 正確。Whatever作受詞，引導完整名詞子句，含先行詞。

extension.note: 複合關係代名詞=自帶先行詞的關係詞，whoever/whatever/whichever三者常見於讓步或條件語境。

parts: The school will award a certificate to
completes all the volunteer hours before the deadline.
exercises.sentence: The school will award a certificate to whoever completes all the volunteer hours before the deadline.
exercises.translation: 學校將向在截止日期前完成所有志願服務時數的任何人頒發證書。

parts: happens, we must maintain our core values and integrity.
exercises.sentence: Whatever happens, we must maintain our core values and integrity.
exercises.translation: 無論發生什麼，我們都必須維持我們的核心價值觀和誠正。

parts: music style you enjoy from this curated playlist collection.
exercises.sentence: You may select whichever music style you enjoy from this curated playlist collection.
exercises.translation: 你可以從這個精選播放清單集合中選擇你喜歡的任何音樂風格。

parts: invested time and effort in this project deserves recognition for their contribution.
exercises.sentence: Whoever invested time and effort in this project deserves recognition for their contribution.
exercises.translation: 無論誰在這個項目中投入時間和努力，都應該因其貢獻而獲得認可。

vocab_table.zh: 任何...哪一個；無論哪一個
